data.text: Committed. Worker detail metadata grid and sections now use semantic typography tokens: container `text-sm` removed, individual elements carry `text-body-md`/`text-body-sm`/`text-label-caps`/`text-mono-code` as appropriate, `font-mono-code` paired with `text-mono-code`, and the alert-caution + lifecycle items moved from `text-xs` to `text-body-sm`. svelte-check passes with 0 errors.
